ValidationRule.description: Events with a Quoted Price above 1,500,000 EGP must be CCO Approved before moving to Proposal Sent.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CASE(Status__c, 'Proposal Sent', 1, 'Confirmed', 1, 'In Planning', 1, 'Executing', 1, 'Completed', 1, 0 ) = 1, Quoted_Price__c > 1500000, CCO_Approved__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This event requires Chief Commercial Officer approval before moving to Proposal Sent because the Quoted Price is above 1,500,000 EGP.
